home_page_description: A free, browser-based suite for working with CSV files. Validate data against custom schemas, catch errors early, and keep your workflows clean — your files never leave your browser.
home_body: A browser-based suite for working with CSV files. Validate your data against simple schemas, catch errors early, and keep your workflows clean.
about_page_description: Learn about CSV Tools — an open-source, browser-based toolkit for validating, inspecting, and transforming CSV files. Your files never leave your browser; all parsing and validation happens client-side.
about_body: CSV Tools is an open-source, browser-based toolkit for validating, inspecting, and transforming CSV files. Your files never leave your browser — all parsing and validation happens client-side.
validator_meta_description: Validate CSV files against a custom schema right in your browser. Define required fields, types, and constraints — your files never leave your browser; all processing happens client-side.
validator_page_description: Upload a CSV, define your schema, and validate every row.
validator_schema_subtext: Set validation rules for each detected column.
validator_error_multiple_files: Please drop a single CSV file.
validator_error_no_headers: The CSV file has no headers. Please upload a file with a header row.
validator_error_must_be_email: Must be a valid email address
validator_error_must_be_date: Must be a valid ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)
validator_announcement_upload: Step 1 of 3: Upload a CSV file.
validator_announcement_schema: Step 2 of 3: Define schema. Configure column types and validation rules.
